overall.description: A cinematic nighttime walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza from the game Cyberpunk 2077. The camera glides smoothly through wet streets reflecting vibrant neon advertisements, passing outdoor cafes and pedestrians in a high-density commercial district with towering digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with illuminated advertisement walls

events.description: camera passes the group of standing NPCs and approaches the exit of the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through a covered walkway past pedestrians standing near advertisement walls

notable_agents.action: woman in black coat leaning against the advertisement wall
man in purple jacket standing and looking around

entered.detail: large curved wall with bright yellow and purple neon advertisements including '16' text
smooth cyan-blue structural support beam with integrated lighting
modern white bench with circular cutout patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian walkway with vibrant neon advertisements lining the left wall. Three NPCs stand near the walls as the camera moves forward, passing them on the way toward the open plaza ahead. The environment features futuristic blue structural elements and modern white seating.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza entrance with digital billboard and seating

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza area with visible sky and city lights
ambient lighting shifts from enclosed neon to open-air city glow with reflections on wet pavement

agents.ego_description: moving through the plaza entrance past benches where people are sitting

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench facing away from camera

entered.detail: tall illuminated advertisement screen displaying 'Worry-free' text with yellow background
row of concrete benches with wooden seats arranged around tree planters
large rectangular planter with mature trees and greenery

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway into an open plaza, revealing a large yellow digital billboard on the right. The wet pavement reflects the ambient city lights as the camera passes benches where pedestrians sit, with tree planters and tall neon buildings visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with outdoor cafe seating and blue glass building

events.description: crowd density increases as camera approaches the outdoor dining area

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward a busy outdoor seating area with illuminated purple furniture

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench using a handheld device

entered.detail: modern building with distinctive cyan-blue glass overhang and entrance
circular tables with illuminated purple chairs and white umbrellas

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the plaza, the camera passes a modern building with a distinctive blue overhang on the right, featuring outdoor cafe seating with glowing purple chairs. The crowd density increases as pedestrians walk through the wet, reflective plaza, with tree planters lining the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy outdoor dining area transitioning to transit station

events.description: camera navigates through denser crowd near cafe tables and turns slightly toward transit station

agents.ego_description: moving through the crowded outdoor cafe area, passing close to seated patrons and walking pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person with red hair and shoulder tattoo walking past the camera

entered.detail: tall vertical digital screen displaying white and red advertisement content
covered structure with glass panels and illuminated signage ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the busiest section of the plaza, navigating between outdoor cafe tables with purple illuminated seating and pedestrians walking in various directions. A distinctive vertical billboard rises on the right as the camera approaches a transit station entrance in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit station approach with towering digital billboards

events.description: approaching the elevated transit track and entering the covered transit area

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the transit station area with large digital displays overhead

entered.detail: glass-covered elevated walkway or track structure with metal framework
tall building facade covered with multiple stacked digital advertisement screens
large pink and purple illuminated palm tree-like artistic structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a transit station with an elevated glass track structure overhead. The camera moves toward the covered walkway entrance, passing towering digital billboard walls on the left and a distinctive neon palm sculpture on the right, with the wet pavement reflecting the intense neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered pedestrian corridor into a sprawling, neon-drenched cyberpunk plaza. It begins within a covered walkway lined with vibrant advertisements and blue structural elements, gliding past waiting NPCs toward the open air. As the camera exits the corridor, the space expands into a wide plaza where wet pavement reflects a massive yellow digital billboard and the surrounding towering skyscrapers. The scene then shifts deeper into the commercial hub, passing a building with a blue overhang and glowing purple cafe seating as the crowd density increases among rows of tree planters. Finally, the camera navigates through the busiest section of the plaza, moving past a vertical billboard and a neon palm sculpture toward the elevated glass tracks of a transit station.
